description.value: SteelPipesFactory - Metallica is a leading pipes wholesaler based in Mumbai, specializing in a comprehensive range of stainless steel pipes. They are a trusted supplier of various types, including stainless steel seamless pipes, welded pipes, and large diameter pipes, catering to diverse industrial needs.

address.value: BIT Chawl No. 4, Near Sandhurst Road Railway Station, Dongri

bio.value:
🔧 Leading Manufacturer of Steel Products | Providing high-quality solutions for diverse industrial applications. 🌍 Committed to precision, durability, and innovation. Explore our extensive range of products and discover how we can support your project!

With over 50 years of experience in the industry, SteelPipesFactory specialize in delivering durable and reliable solutions for a wide range of applications, including oil and gas, construction, and manufacturing.

We utilize advanced technology and rigorous quality control processes to ensure that every product meets the highest industry standards. From custom designs to standard sizes, we offer a comprehensive selection of pipes, tubes and pipe fittings to meet your specific needs.

Explore our product range and discover how SteelPipesFactory can help you achieve your project goals. Connect with us for inquiries, collaborations, or to learn more about our services. Your success is our priority!

products.buyer_persona: A procurement manager or engineer in industrial sectors (e.g., chemical, oil & gas, power generation) seeking durable, corrosion-resistant piping for high-temperature fluid or gas conveyance systems.
products.description: Our Stainless Steel High Temperature Pipes/Tubes are engineered for demanding industrial applications requiring exceptional heat resistance and structural integrity. Available in various material grades and dimensions, these pipes are offered at competitive prices with options for bulk orders. Ideal for chemical processing, oil & gas, and power generation sectors, they ensure reliable fluid and gas conveyance in extreme thermal environments. Manufactured by Metallica, these pipes meet stringent quality standards for durability and performance.
products.seo_title: SS High Temperature Pipes/Tubes — Corrosion Resistant | Buy Online

products.clean_name: Stainless Steel High Pressure Pipe Tubes
products.buyer_persona: A procurement manager or engineer in industries like chemical processing, oil & gas, power generation, or water treatment, seeking durable pipes for high-pressure fluid transfer.
products.description: These Stainless Steel High Pressure Pipe Tubes are designed to withstand extreme internal pressures, making them essential for critical industrial fluid transfer systems. We offer a range of sizes and material grades, with pricing available upon request for custom specifications and bulk purchases. Perfect for chemical, petrochemical, and hydraulic applications, these pipes ensure safe and efficient operation under high-stress conditions. SteelPipesFactory - Metallica guarantees superior strength and leak-proof performance for your demanding projects.
products.seo_title: SS High Pressure Pipe Tubes — Durable & Leak-Proof | Buy Online
products.alt_text: Stainless Steel High Pressure Pipe Tubes for industrial fluid transfer from SteelPipesFactory - Metallica

products.buyer_persona: A procurement manager or engineer sourcing piping components for industrial fluid transfer systems, construction, or structural applications.
products.description: Our Stainless Steel Seamless Tubes are manufactured without a weld seam, offering superior strength, uniform wall thickness, and enhanced corrosion resistance for critical applications. These tubes are available in various grades and dimensions, with competitive pricing for both standard and custom orders. They are widely used in industries such as oil & gas, chemical processing, and automotive for fluid conveyance and structural support. Metallica's seamless tubes provide unmatched reliability and longevity, ensuring optimal performance in demanding environments.
products.seo_title: SS Seamless Tubes — High Strength & Corrosion Resistant | Buy Online
products.alt_text: Stainless Steel Seamless Tube for critical industrial applications from SteelPipesFactory - Metallica

products.buyer_persona: A procurement manager or engineer in industries like pharmaceuticals, biotechnology, food & beverage, or semiconductor manufacturing, seeking specialized tubing for critical process applications requiring high cleanliness and corrosion resistance.
products.description: These Stainless Steel Electropolished or High Purity Tubes are specifically processed to achieve an ultra-smooth, passive surface, crucial for applications demanding extreme cleanliness and corrosion resistance. Available in various grades and precise dimensions, pricing is tailored to specific purity requirements and order volumes. They are indispensable for pharmaceutical, biotechnology, semiconductor, and food & beverage industries where contamination control is paramount. SteelPipesFactory - Metallica delivers tubes that meet the highest standards for surface finish and material integrity.

products.buyer_persona: A procurement manager or engineer in a heavy industry (e.g., petrochemical, power generation, metallurgy) looking for high-temperature resistant tubing for furnace construction or repair.
products.description: Our Stainless Steel Furnace Tubes are engineered for extreme high-temperature environments, offering exceptional resistance to heat, oxidation, and creep deformation. Available in specialized heat-resistant grades and custom dimensions, these tubes are priced competitively for industrial bulk procurement. They are vital components in petrochemical refineries, power plants, and metallurgical furnaces, ensuring efficient heat transfer and prolonged operational life. Metallica's furnace tubes are built for reliability and endurance in the most severe thermal conditions.

We offer a range of sizes and material grades, with pricing available upon request for custom specifications and bulk purchases. Perfect for chemical, petrochemical, and hydraulic applications, these pipes ensure safe and efficient operation under high-stress conditions. SteelPipesFactory - Metallica guarantees superior strength and leak-proof performance for your demanding projects. Explore our product range and discover how SteelPipesFactory can help you achieve your project goals. Connect with us for inquiries, collaborations, or to learn more about our services. Your success is our priority!
